headline: National Infrastructure Audit Reveals RM180 Billion Gap
context: EPU national infrastructure audit identified RM180 billion in deferred maintenance and upgrade needs across all categories by 2030.

cards.big: National audit reveals RM180 billion infrastructure investment gap to 2030
cards.sub: Water transport energy and buildings all face critical maintenance backlogs

cards.big: Water infrastructure accounts for RM45 billion of the total gap
cards.sub: Road and transport infrastructure represents another RM52 billion in needs

cards.big: Annual infrastructure maintenance spending would need to triple from current levels
cards.sub: Current RM22 billion yearly allocation covers only 12% of identified requirements

cards.big: Rating agencies warned infrastructure deterioration could affect Malaysia credit outlook
cards.sub: Moody cited infrastructure risk as factor in stable rather than positive outlook

cards.big: Infrastructure gap tests whether Malaysia can fund maintenance alongside new construction
RM180 billion infrastructure gap — the audit reveals what deferred maintenance costs a generation later.
